gates.title: Production GitHub App named 6529bot exists with documented permissions, events, registration packet evidence, webhook secret handling, and private-key rotation.
Central App server and at least one worker path are deployed, or release notes mark the release local/dogfood-only.
Provider keys, GitHub App secrets, AWS Data API access, and alert secrets are configured only in bot-owned infrastructure.
AWS IAM/OIDC trust and identity policies are reviewed from infra/aws templates or equivalent least-privilege documents.
6529.io public usage dashboard is merged, deployed, and wired to the public usage API, or explicitly deferred.
6529.io private admin surface is wired to the HMAC auth bridge, or explicitly deferred behind operator-only APIs.
Dogfood repository configuration has been merged into at least one trusted 6529 repository and tested in command-only mode.
Aurora ledger schema has been applied, or release notes mark ledger setup as manual.
Central budget policy rows have been reviewed and applied, or release notes explicitly keep budget control to environment/repository caps.
Model pricing rows have been reviewed against current provider docs and applied, or release notes keep conservative default estimates.
Run-control claims are enforced with conservative caps, or release notes explicitly defer enforcement.
Limited initial-review dogfood run completed with conservative budget caps, visible comments, and ledgered usage.
Scheduled spend alerts route to an operator-owned channel.
npm run release:check passes from a clean main checkout.
npm run preflight -- -- --strict passes in the release candidate environment, or warnings are accepted in release notes.
GitHub CI, Dependency Review, and OpenSSF Scorecard have been reviewed.
docs/security-review-checklist.md has been completed for the release candidate.
CHANGELOG.md, README.md, release notes, templates, and deployment docs match the tagged behavior.
